MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM Video-conferencing:

No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

The verified application of John Maggio to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendants City and County of San Francisco and San Francisco International Airport is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Counsel for the defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior.
